tasks.subject: Task 1: Contrast verification gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dependency-free script proving every critical fg/bg pair clears WCAG 2.2 AA in both themes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/scripts/check-contrast.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["OKLCH->sRGB->luminance->ratio","all light+dark pairs asserted","exits non-zero on failure"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Rewrite token system in main.css
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace main.css tokens with the full Cool Slate system: ramps, canvas/card inversion, three-plane neutrals, state steps, info + border-strong, complete .dark block.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/assets/main.css"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run build && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["existing utilities revalued not removed","new ramp utilities exist","--background=canvas, --card=white","dark block + @theme inline intact"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: AA-correct StatusBadge + info variant
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Re-base StatusBadge variants on -50 tint + -700 text (fixes amber-on-tint AA bug); add info variant.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/StatusBadge.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/StatusBadge.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/StatusBadge.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["-50/-700 variants","caution not text-amber","info variant teal","neutral unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: useTheme composable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Composable wrapping useColorMode: persists light/dark/auto to localStorage['theme'], toggles dark class on <html>.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/composables/useTheme.ts","dashboard/src/composables/useTheme.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/composables/useTheme.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["mode + setMode exposed","dark class toggles on html","persists to localStorage theme"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ThemeToggle control + i18n
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Compact 3-way Light/System/Dark control bound to useTheme, labelled + keyboard-operable.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/ThemeToggle.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/ThemeToggle.test.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/ThemeToggle.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["three labelled options","aria-pressed on active, click sets mode","theme.* i18n, no curly quotes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Global theme init + wire into NavUser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply persisted theme on every route (App.vue); surface toggle in account dropdown without closing the menu.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/App.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/NavUser.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/NavUser.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/NavUser.test.ts && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["useTheme() in App.vue setup","ThemeToggle in non-item wrapper, stops propagation","NavUser test asserts toggle"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Surface sweep + dark-mode review
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm no surface hard-assumes pure-white under the inversion; visually verify both themes.

```json:metadata
{"files":[],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["stray surfaces read correctly","spinners legible","AuthBackdrop untouched","no CSP change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Update DESIGN.md + rebuild dist (done-gate)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Align DESIGN.md with implemented tokens/rules, rebuild embedded SPA, run full gate.

```json:metadata
{"files":["DESIGN.md","pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run build && npx vitest run && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs && cd .. && go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["DESIGN.md sections updated","dark values pinned","dist rebuilt+committed","full gate green"]}
```
